facebook.caption:
This place fixes something in you.

Dinh Cậu sits right on the rocks at the edge of Dương Đông harbor. A small shrine to the goddess of the sea, a blue-and-white striped lighthouse, fishing boats rolling in at dusk. No entrance fee. No crowd barrier.

Just stand there for five minutes. You'll get it.

4.5 stars across 3,426 reviews. People keep coming back.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Waves hitting the rocks. Incense smoke drifting past a lighthouse. Fishing boats coming home at golden hour. Dinh Cậu hits different when you see it in motion.
